title: UAE announces petrol and diesel prices for July 2026; fuel rates cut after four months of hikes
summary_full: UAE motorists can finally breathe easier as fuel prices for July 2026 see a significant drop, ending a four-month surge. This welcome relief follows a cooling in global oil markets, with diesel prices falling by nearly 17% and petrol by almost 14%. Drivers can expect substantial savings on full tanks, easing household budgets and business operating costs.
